---
title: "Sayak Paul"
toc: false
---

<img src="posts/carted_headshot.jpg" style="float: left; width: 230px; margin-right: 20px;"> Hi there 👋 I am Sayak Paul (সায়ক পাল). I work on [🧨 diffusion models](https://hf.co/docs/diffusers) at [Hugging Face](https://hf.co). Know more about me from [here](https://sayak.dev/about). I maintain a Google Doc answering some FAQs at length. You can check it out [here](https://bit.ly/sayak-faqs). </img>

My external articles and other publishing engagements are listed [here](pages/authoring.qmd). Decks
from my speaking engagements are listed [here](pages/talksseminarsworkshops.qmd). A detailed account of the things that are not
directly available from the top navbar (interviews, talks etc.) can be found [here](pages/resources.qmd).

The structure of this website is inspired by [Omar's site](https://osanseviero.github.io/hackerllama/).
<br><br>

### News

- [From Statics to Dynamics: Physics-Aware Image Editing with Latent Transition Priors](https://huggingface.co/papers/2602.21778) with Zhao et al. was accepted to ICML'26 🎉
- We got Claude Code to write custom kernels for LTX and got them to beat the baseline benchmark! Check it out [here](https://huggingface.co/blog/custom-cuda-kernels-agent-skills).
- New work -- [Faster Diffusion on Blackwell: MXFP8 and NVFP4 with Diffusers and TorchAO](https://pytorch.org/blog/faster-diffusion-on-blackwell-mxfp8-and-nvfp4-with-diffusers-and-torchao/).
- Gave a talk on "torch.compile and Diffusers: A Hands-On Guide to Peak Performance" at PyTorch Conference EU 2026 (Paris). Slides are [here](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/19IgxCVz-e63Z_jehDv05XBShE6-j7j39zXwuT6JPHLM/edit?usp=sharing). Recording is [here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eWcsyglv8JI).
- Organizing a tutorial on Post-Training Diffusion Models: Enhancing Capabilities, Control, and Alignment at ECCV'26. Check out the details [here](https://pdm-tut.github.io/).

To know more about my projects, please refer to [my GitHub profile](https://github.com/sayakpaul). For an up-to-date list of my publications, refer to [my Google Scholar page](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ecW-EE4AAAAJ&hl=en#).

Apart from the blogs [here](blog.qmd), I try to contribute to other platforms in the form of writing. Please refer [here](https://sayak.dev/authoring)
for more details.
